paper.title: GDPval: Evaluating AI Model Performance on Real-World Economically Valuable Tasks

dataset.license_evidence: No license field appears in the pinned Hugging Face API cardData or tags, and the pinned README contains no license declaration. Do not infer a license from public accessibility.
dataset.url_note: The source Parquet stores mutable main-branch URLs. tasks.jsonl preserves those fields and adds reference_file_pinned_urls and deliverable_file_pinned_urls resolved against the exact revision above.

representative_task_inspection.inspection: Parsed OOXML directly. The reference has 1,517 rows and 8 columns. The expert deliverable has 1,517 rows and 10 columns plus a seven-row second worksheet; sampled cells include a quarter-on-quarter formula and the second worksheet records 90% confidence, 10% error rate, and sample size 65. This verifies that the binary pair is readable and corresponds to the prompt/rubric metadata; it is not a quality judgment.

inspection_scope: Verified the complete immutable v1 PDF and non-empty 29-page layout text extraction; parsed all 220 task rows, prompts, file locators, and 10,453 human-authored rubric items from the pinned Parquet; checked all 509 referenced/deliverable paths against the complete 552-file pinned tree; downloaded and structurally inspected one complete spreadsheet reference/deliverable pair. The remaining approximately 2.29 GB public binary corpus was not mirrored locally; its exact object metadata and revision-pinned retrieval URLs are preserved.
review_boundary: Source acquisition and extraction only. No deep review, validity judgment, or benchmark claim is made here.
